recommendations.title: Add a Codex skill plus workflow for maintaining a canonical backlog of project recommendations
recommendations.summary: Add a skill/workflow pair that keeps recommendations canonical and derives implementation tasks from them.
recommendations.details: Create the backlog skill, backlog workflow, and supporting store so recommendations stay separate from executable tasks.

recommendations.title: Add the ClawHub MCP so backlog intake, triage, and project-status sync can use an external project-management surface
recommendations.summary: Mirror backlog state to ClawHub when configured.
recommendations.details: Use ClawHub as an optional external project-management surface for intake, triage, and status sync when available.

recommendations.title: Add a shared registry resolver so skill selection, skill loading, and external discovery all use one precedence path
recommendations.summary: Unify registry precedence across selection, loading, and discovery.
recommendations.details: Replace duplicate registry fallback logic with a shared resolver so core, overlay, and external skill paths stay aligned.

recommendations.title: Add a backlog-intake hook on UserPromptSubmit to capture new recommendations, tasks, and project requests
recommendations.details: Detect backlog language in prompts and append recommendation records so the list stays current.

recommendations.title: Add a backlog-sync hook on TaskComplete or Stop to mark items complete with commit SHA and verification status
recommendations.summary: Close backlog items when implementation is committed and verified.
recommendations.details: Record completion evidence from the runtime so recommendation and task status stay in sync with actual commits.
